properties.Clean_Data:
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM FLOWFILE 
WHERE customer_name IS NOT NULL AND customer_name <> '' 
AND city IS NOT NULL AND city <> ''
AND (age IS NULL OR CAST(age AS VARCHAR) <> 'N/A')

properties.Custom Query:
SELECT 
    id, 
    'database' AS source_type,
    CAST(id AS VARCHAR) AS record_id,
    customer_name,
    NULL AS age,
    city,
    product,
    quantity,
    price,
    order_status AS status,
    created_at AS event_time,
    (quantity * price) AS total_amount
FROM sales_orders
properties.Columns to Return: id, customer_name, city, product, quantity, price, order_status, created_at

Maximum Number of Files to Track.name: Maximum Number of Files to Track
Maximum Number of Files to Track.displayName: Maximum Number of Files to Track

properties.normlaized:
SELECT 
    'file' AS source_type,
    '' AS record_id, 
    name AS customer_name,
    age,
    city,
    product,
    quantity,
    CAST(price AS DOUBLE) AS price,
    'unknown' AS status,
    "timestamp" AS event_time,
    (CAST(quantity AS DOUBLE) * CAST(price AS DOUBLE)) AS total_amount
FROM FLOWFILE
